output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?pm ?pmLabel ?spouseLabel ?partnerLabel WHERE {
  ?pm wdt:P39 wd:Q14211 .
  ?pm wdt:P26 ?spouse .
  ?pm wdt:P451 ?partner .
  FILTER(?spouse != ?partner)
  ?pm rdfs:label ?pmLabel .
  ?spouse rdfs:label ?spouseLabel .
  ?partner rdfs:label ?partnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?pmLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?spouseLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?partnerLabel) = "en")
}
